title: AI knowledge base tool evaluation: Notion vs Confluence vs GitBook remote knowledge comparison - 2026 Review
description: Evaluate the intelligent search and knowledge management functions of AI knowledge base tools such as Notion, Confluence, and GitBook to help you find the most suitable knowledge accumulation solution for remote teams.
content: \u003ch2\u003eKnowledge management challenges for remote teams\u003c/h2\u003e\u003cp\u003eRemote teams need to accumulate knowledge: document management, knowledge retrieval, team sharing.
